tools.name: root.createApplication
tools.description: You use a `POST` request to create a new application.

tools.name: root.deleteApplication
tools.description: You use a `DELETE` request to delete a single application.

tools.name: root.retrieveApplication
tools.description: You use a `GET` request to retrieve details about a single application.

tools.name: root.retrieveApplications
tools.description: You use a `GET` request to retrieve details of all applications associated with your account.

tools.name: root.updateApplication
tools.description: You use a `PUT` request to update an existing application.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
